name: Hershey Bar Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Graham cracker pie crust, broken into pieces
6 Hershey bars with nuts, each weighing 1.35 oz (including the nuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the milk, melted chocolate from the Hershey bars, and marshmallows in a double boiler on top of a simmering water bath. Melt gently until smooth.
2. Remove from heat and let cool completely before adding whipped topping.
3. Gently fold the whipped topping into the cooled chocolate mixture.
4. Pour the filling into the prepared pie crust.
5. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 3 hours, or until ready to serve.
